zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Roet於1350年11月25日出生在比利時海瑙特時，她的父親Sir Payn de Roet39歲，母親Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes30歲。她於1366年5月與Sir Hugh Swynford在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1403年5月10日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年52歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾林肯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Roet于1350年11月25日出生在比利时海瑙特时，她的父亲Sir Payn de Roet39岁，母亲Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes30岁。她于1366年5月与Sir Hugh Swynford在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1403年5月10日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年52岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾林肯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of German Rönn, itself a variant of Rönne (see Ronne ).

variants.name: Roe
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English ro(o) ‘roe deer’ (Old English rā). This is the midland and southern form, also found in South Yorkshire and Lancashire. In much of northern England, however, rā remained unrounded and survives as Ray 3.
English: post-medieval variant of Wroe (see Wray ). Wroe may also have been used as a spelling of Roe .
English: post-medieval variant of   Row   (or vice versa); see   Rowe  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Roet was born on 25 November 1350, in Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Sir Payn de Roet, was 39 and her mother, Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, was 30. She married Sir Hugh Swynford in May 1366, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 10 May 1403, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Roet est née le 25 novembre 1350, à Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Sir Payn de Roet, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Swynford en mai 1366, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1403, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Roet am 25. November 1350 in Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Payn de Roet 39 und ihre Mutter Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes 30. Sie hat im Mai 1366 in Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh Swynford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1403 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Roet è nata il il 25 novembre 1350 nel Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Sir Payn de Roet, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Swynford nel maggio 1366, nel Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1403, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Roetが1350年11月25日にベルギーヘイナトで生まれた時，父Sir Payn de Roetは39歳，母Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnesは30歳であった。1366年5月にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでSir Hugh Swynfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年5月10日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで52歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Roet(이)가 1350년 11월 25일 벨기에 하인오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Payn de Roet(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1366년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Sir Hugh Swynford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1403년 5월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 링코컨에 묻혔다.

pt.25 November 1350–10 May 1403: 25 de novembro de 1350–10 de maio de 1403
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Roet nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1350, em Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Sir Payn de Roet, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Swynford em maio de 1366, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1403, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Roet родилась 25 ноября 1350 г. в местности ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Sir Payn de Roet было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Swynford май 1366 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1403 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия.

sm.between 1371 and 1394: mai le 1371 e o'o I le 1394

es.25 November 1350–10 May 1403: 25 de noviembre de 1350–10 de mayo de 1403
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Roet nació el 25 de noviembre de 1350, en Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Sir Payn de Roet, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Countess Katherine de Roët Avesnes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Swynford en mayo de 1366, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1403, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
